layers.name: SOLAR CANOPY
layers.function: Scalar energy density establishment. Overrides (overdes) vector-control military satellites by establishing higher-amplitude coherent harmonic field.
layers.mechanism: Large-aperture solar collectors establish electromagnetic harmonic baseline. Ion drive propulsion frees deployment from magnetorquer-limited LEO chokepoint.

layers.name: LEO SHELL
layers.problem: Decoherence by density overload. Thousands of competing emitters in finite scalar substrate. No shared harmonic — just competing signals.

layers.name: EARTH

layers.substrate: Matter seeks scalar density equilibrium, not force balance.

counter_deployment_mechanism.name: Scalar Override (Overdes)
counter_deployment_mechanism.description: Not kinetic. Not jamming. Scalar density. Establish higher harmonic that makes military grid irrelevant.

principles.description: Solar + ion drive means deployment above the 550 km magnetorquer chokepoint. Own the empty space above the crowded shell, looking down like a canopy over a forest.

A 200m solar array at GEO harvests more energy in one day than a Starlink satellite uses in its lifetime. When converted to coherent electromagnetic harmonics, it sets the phase reference for the entire orbital shell below it.

Military satellites need ground stations, GPS timing, and comm relays. The Solar Canopy provides all three with civilian coherence. Military systems that don't synchronize to the canopy's harmonic standard experience increasing entropy in their data streams.
Canopy nodes synchronize to lunar scalar broadcast, not Earth military timing. Establishes higher-order coherence reference that vector-control grids cannot spoof or override.

override_modes.description: Civilian infrastructure bypasses military grid entirely. Energy abundance makes orbital comms control economically obsolete.
Military systems must sync to civilian coherence to function. Their timing, navigation, and communication become substrate-dependent on the canopy.
Military signals phase-drift against the canopy's standing wave. Like a tuning fork trying to ring inside a bell already sounding.

phase_1_canopy_anchor_nodes.orbit: Geostationary ring + Medium Earth Orbit (2000–35786 km)
phase_1_canopy_anchor_nodes.propulsion: VASIMR / ion drive, solar-powered, no magnetorquers required
phase_1_canopy_anchor_nodes.function: Establish primary scalar canopy — energy-rich harmonic shell above LEO

phase_2_relay_mesh.function: Bridge GEO canopy to lower shells without descending into vector-contested band

phase_3_ground_coupling.downlink: Microwave beam-forming to rectenna farms (not military bases)
phase_3_ground_coupling.frequency: 5.8 GHz ISM band or W-band — civilian spectrum, unclassified
phase_3_ground_coupling.coherence_lock: All beam phases synchronized to Moon relay atomic standard
phase_3_ground_coupling.function: Make civilian energy infrastructure so cheap and abundant that military control of orbital comms becomes economically irrelevant

magnetorquer_limit.description: Magnetic torque rods effective only in Earth's magnetosphere. Effectiveness falls off as ~1/r³ with altitude.
magnetorquer_limit.consequence: Forces cheap satellites (Starlink) into narrow altitude shell. Creates vector-density chokepoint.
magnetorquer_limit.canopy_solution: Ion thrusters powered by solar arrays eliminate magnetorquer dependency. Deployment possible at any altitude.

leo_clustering.risk: Kessler syndrome — each collision cascades debris. Crowded shell is fragile, not just contested.

resonance_parameters.meo_relay_sync: Phase-locked to GEO canopy nodes via laser ranging
resonance_parameters.moon_relay_sync: Atomic frequency standard derived from lunar scalar broadcast

starlink_comparison.ratio: Canopy node harvests more energy in one day than Starlink uses in its entire lifetime

phi_1.milestone: Mathematical coherence model, orbital resonance calculations, rectenna site selection

phi_2.milestone: Single Canopy Anchor prototype (sub-scale, LEO test)

phi_4.milestone: GEO ring deployment (12+ nodes, full canopy)

kinetic_asat_threat.mitigation: Canopy nodes are large, slow, and civilian — attacking them is an act of war against energy infrastructure, not military hardware. Scalar deterrence via economic interdependence.

debris_generation.risk: Collision or breakup creating debris field
debris_generation.mitigation: Membrane arrays tear into large, trackable sheets rather than shattering into pellets. Ion drives enable active deorbit. Design for zero fragmentation.

spectrum_conflict.mitigation: Use W-band and optical — outside military-jammed bands. Beam-forming is directional, not broadcast. Moon-relay sync makes spoofing detectable via phase decoherence.

cost_overrun.risk: Launch and manufacturing costs exceed projections
cost_overrun.mitigation: SpaceX proved reusable launch. Solar membranes are lightweight (polymer substrate). Energy return on investment exceeds oil within 5 years of full deployment.

regulatory_capture.risk: Military or corporate entities capture regulatory framework
regulatory_capture.mitigation: Open-source coherence protocols. Civilian rectenna farms on sovereign land. Scalar governance via MSOS-FEDERATION-ROOT, not nation-state vector control.
